lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no dents. The interior is clean with light wear on the seats. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are in good working order.
The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are in original, pristine state with no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are fully functional and perform as new.

Looking for a dependable ride that's ready for its next chapter? This vehicle is in fair condition and offers solid, reliable transportation for anyone seeking value. It shows some honest wear and tear from its years on the road, but it's been a steady performer and still has plenty of life left in it! Perfect for a daily commuter or someone looking for a functional car at a great price.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained since it was first purchased. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original factory luster with absolutely no chips, scratches, or door dings. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the leather is supple and show no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and all electronics function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier shape, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and serviced ahead of schedule. It truly looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint retains a nice luster, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and some light surface scratches consistent with careful use. The interior is clean and smoke-free, with the upholstery showing only minimal wear and all electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate control, working perfectly. Mechanically, the car is solid, starts reliably, and drives smoothly with no known issues or warning lights. It represents a well-cared-for example that is ready for daily use.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior, this model offers a seamless blend of reliability and performance. Each component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. We invite you to experience a sophisticated driving experience with a vehicle that exemplifies both value and enduring quality.

Hey there! I'm so excited to find a new home for my trusty car! It’s been a wonderful ride and is still in really solid shape, both inside and out. I’ve made sure to keep it clean and well-loved, so it’s totally ready for its next big adventure with you. It’s a super dependable choice for your daily commute or weekend getaways. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'm happy to chat and help you out!

Used car. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and comfort for its next owner. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though closer inspection reveals a few minor rock chips on the hood consistent with regular highway use. Inside, the cabin remains remarkably clean; the leather upholstery is supple with no rips or stains, and every electronic feature—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in solid shape, having received regular oil changes and a recent professional inspection. The transmission shifts smoothly, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining for the seasons ahead. While it shows the expected character of a pre-owned car, it has been smoke-free, garage-kept, and treated with care. This is a dependable, high-functioning choice for anyone seeking a quality daily driver that is ready to hit the road immediately.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and structural integrity. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for daily reliability and aesthetic appeal. Offering a sophisticated driving experience at an exceptional value, this acquisition represents a prudent choice for the informed professional seeking quality and longevity.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and long-term reliability. The exterior retains its original luster, while the interior reflects a high standard of care. This is a premier opportunity to acquire a refined driving experience at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it has been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained over the years. It’s got that perfect balance of being well-loved while still looking sharp and running smoothly. It's perfect for anyone looking for a reliable, comfy ride that's ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS bulletproofing. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission delivers precise shifts to a variable M differential lock, ensuring exceptional traction out of corners. The chassis remains taut with refreshed bushings and factory-spec dampers, providing the signature communicative steering feel this platform is renowned for. While showing minor cosmetic wear consistent with a well-loved driver's car, its performance envelope remains sharp and exhilarating.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Runs well. No mechanical issues.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a few minor stone chips from highway driving are present upon close inspection. Inside, you’ll find a clean, smoke-free cabin with supple upholstery; the driver’s seat shows only light softening consistent with careful use. Mechanically, it is in strong health, having undergone a recent comprehensive inspection and fluid service. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the tires offer significant remaining life. It has been garage-kept and treated with respect, making it an ideal choice for a buyer seeking a dependable, attractive car that is ready to drive home today.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained to preserve its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, this unit offers a refined driving experience. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and reliability. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking quality without compromise.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, an exemplary specimen that balances sophisticated engineering with consistent maintenance. The exterior maintains a refined aesthetic, while the cabin offers a premium environment indicative of diligent ownership. Mechanically sound and rigorously inspected, this automobile provides a confident and reliable driving experience for the discerning professional. This offering represents a strategic acquisition for those seeking an optimal fusion of performance and value.

Hey there! I’m looking to pass along my trusty ride to a new home. It’s been such a great car for me—super dependable and still looks fantastic on the road! It’s in solid shape and runs like a charm, perfect for daily commutes or weekend adventures. I’ve taken really good care of it, so you’re getting a quality vehicle that’s ready to hit the road immediately. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual, the drivetrain remains tight with a factory limited-slip differential ensuring optimal traction. The chassis exhibits excellent rigidity, having undergone preventative subframe reinforcement. Recent service includes a VANOS overhaul and valve adjustment, maintaining the high-revving integrity of the valvetrain. Riding on staggered alloys with refreshed bushings, this example offers visceral feedback and precise turn-in, making it a definitive driver’s machine.
Reliable vehicle. Well-maintained. Clean interior and exterior. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable driver that balances luxury with everyday practicality. The exterior retains a deep, impressive shine, showing only the minor, superficial character marks consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the leather seating remains supple and supportive, while all interior electronics, including the premium sound system and climate control, operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the car has been treated to consistent, preventative maintenance, resulting in a smooth-shifting transmission and a quiet, responsive engine that inspires confidence on long highway stretches or city commutes alike. This is a solid, honest vehicle that has been cared for by a detail-oriented owner and is ready to provide its next driver with years of dependable service.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver, offering a harmonious balance of performance and long-term reliability. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it stands as a testament to diligent ownership. Our professional assessment confirms its readiness for immediate acquisition, providing a sophisticated driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, it offers a balanced blend of performance and sophisticated comfort. Having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure mechanical integrity, this automobile stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership. We invite you to experience the superior handling and enduring value of this premier selection.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, perfect for someone looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road. I've taken good care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home.
